ingredients_text: MILK CHOCOLATE (36%) (Sugar, Cocoa Butter*, Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Mass*, Lactose (Milk), Sweet Whey Powder (Milk), Emulsifier: Lecithins (Soya); Salt, Vanilla Extract), CARAMEL (33%) [Sweetened Condensed Skimmed Milk (Condensed Skimmed Milk, Sugar), Glucose Syrup, Palm Fat, Humectant: Sorbitols; Caramelised Sugar Syrup, Salt, Barley Malt Extract], BISCUIT (31%) (Wheat Flour, Palm Fat, Sugar, Fat Reduced Cocoa Powder*, Raising Agent: Sodium Carbonates; Salt, Emulsifier. Lecithins (Soya)). MILK CHOCOLATE CONTAINS COCOA SOLIDS 27% MINIMUM, MILK SOLIDS 14% MINIMUM. *Rainforest Alliance Certified.
